This directory contains the `mcr2vmp` reference converter source used for
PS1 memory card conversion between raw `.mcd/.mcr` files and PSP/Vita
`SCEVMC*.VMP` files.

Source reference:
- https://github.com/chrisbrasington/psp_psx_save_sync
- based on `vita-mcr2vmp` by `@dots_tb`

The original license file is included as `LICENSE`.
